item.title: His Public Image Hid A Disturbing Double Life
item.description: Jared Fogle rose to fame as the face of a major weight loss success story, but a federal investigation later uncovered crimes that shattered his reputation. The case revealed a stark contrast between his public persona and his private actions.

media:content.media:title: His Public Image Hid A Disturbing Double Life
media:content.media:description: Jared Fogle rose to fame as the face of a major weight loss success story, but a federal investigation later uncovered crimes that shattered his reputation. The case revealed a stark contrast between his public persona and his private actions.

item.title: She Vanished After A Massive Fraud Investigation
item.description: Melissa Caddick disappeared from her Sydney home just one day after authorities searched the property as part of a major financial fraud investigation. Months later, a shocking discovery raised even more questions about what happened to one of Australia's most infamous fugitives.

media:content.media:title: She Vanished After A Massive Fraud Investigation
media:content.media:description: Melissa Caddick disappeared from her Sydney home just one day after authorities searched the property as part of a major financial fraud investigation. Months later, a shocking discovery raised even more questions about what happened to one of Australia's most infamous fugitives.

item.title: A 12 Year Old's Secret Led To A Tragic Night
item.description: Chris Pittman was just 12 years old when a devastating crime left his family and community searching for answers. The case sparked years of debate over mental health, prescription medication, and how much responsibility a child can truly bear for such actions.

media:content.media:title: A 12 Year Old's Secret Led To A Tragic Night
media:content.media:description: Chris Pittman was just 12 years old when a devastating crime left his family and community searching for answers. The case sparked years of debate over mental health, prescription medication, and how much responsibility a child can truly bear for such actions.

item.title: A Toddler Vanished And The Truth Broke Hearts
item.description: 15 month old Evelyn Boswell was reported missing in Tennessee after months without being seen by relatives or authorities. As investigators searched for answers, the case uncovered a series of troubling events that ultimately led to criminal charges against her mother.

media:content.media:title: A Toddler Vanished And The Truth Broke Hearts
media:content.media:description: 15 month old Evelyn Boswell was reported missing in Tennessee after months without being seen by relatives or authorities. As investigators searched for answers, the case uncovered a series of troubling events that ultimately led to criminal charges against her mother.

item.title: She Walked Home From A Friend's House And Vanished
item.description: Lindsey Baum was 10 years old when she disappeared while walking home in Washington state in 2009. Years later, her remains were found miles away, but investigators are still searching for answers about what happened to her.

media:content.media:title: She Walked Home From A Friend's House And Vanished
media:content.media:description: Lindsey Baum was 10 years old when she disappeared while walking home in Washington state in 2009. Years later, her remains were found miles away, but investigators are still searching for answers about what happened to her.
